offer: For Shopify sellers processing 10–50 orders/month, fragmented customer data causes missed sales opportunities. We provide a unified view instead of manual data aggregation from multiple sources.
problem: Fragmented customer data leading to inefficient sales operations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 Shopify sellers with demo video
Participate in forums where Shopify sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try data aggregation and custom reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
